messages.content:
Status of "SpongeBob SquarePants" in countries with the letter "A" (including partially recognized) 

If there is, then the status will be "yes" and tell on which TV channels it is broadcast in a particular country, there is partially (there are only subtitles or it is broadcasting in English and also tell me on which TV channel), then the status will be "partially", and if not, then the status will be "no" (also state the reason) and "unknown" if unknown

Here is the status of "SpongeBob SquarePants" in countries with the letter "A":

1. Albania: Yes, it is broadcast on the TV channel Top Channel.

2. Algeria: Partially. It is sometimes broadcast in Arabic with subtitles on the TV channel Nickelodeon Arabia.

3. Andorra: Yes, it is broadcast on the TV channel Nickelodeon.

4. Angola: No. The reason is unknown.

5. Antigua and Barbuda: Yes, it is broadcast on the TV channel Nickelodeon.

6. Argentina: Yes, it is broadcast on the TV channels Nickelodeon and Telefe.

7. Armenia: Yes, it is broadcast on the TV channel Nickelodeon.

8. Australia: Yes, it is broadcast on the TV channel Nickelodeon.

9. Austria: Yes, it is broadcast on the TV channels Nickelodeon and Puls 4.

10. Azerbaijan: Partially. It is sometimes broadcast in English with subtitles on the TV channel Nickelodeon.

Please note that TV schedules and broadcasting rights change frequently, so it's advisable to check local listings or contact your local TV providers for the most up-to-date information.
